ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false ,IF( Collection_Agency__c = 9999 && ISCHANGED( OwnerId) && Owner_Name__c <> 'System API' , true, false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A warehouse account cannot be owned by a CFG staff member.
